description_long: This object is a desktop computer setup featuring a flat-screen monitor, a rectangular tower case, a keyboard, and a mouse, all connected by visible cables. The monitor has a wide, black bezel and sits on a circular pedestal stand, with a sleek, modern appearance. The tower case is tall and boxy, with a matte black finish and subtle detailing. The keyboard is slim and rectangular, while the mouse is compact and ergonomically shaped. The cables are loosely arranged, connecting the components in a realistic manner. The overall design is utilitarian and typical of office or home computer workstations.
description: A modern desktop computer setup with a flat-screen monitor, tower case, keyboard, and mouse, all in black with visible connecting cables.
description_view_0: Front view showing the monitor's screen, keyboard, mouse, and the tower case to the right, with all cables visible.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the tower case, with cables trailing and only the edge of the monitor and keyboard visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the monitor and tower, with cables extending outward and the mouse and keyboard partially visible.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite direction, showing the monitor's profile, the back of the keyboard, and the tower case behind.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is moderately thick, matte black, with straight edges and slightly rounded corners, providing a clean and modern frame around the display area.
attribute_stand_type: The monitor is supported by a circular pedestal stand, made of black plastic or metal, with a broad, flat base for stability and no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: Physical buttons are not clearly visible on the front or sides of the monitor; any controls are likely minimal or located on the rear or underside, but not discernible in these views.
